name: PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M_
description:
This stores two levels of the 3-Tier Model: Employment/Placement Terms (Level 2) and Assignments (Level 3). The assignment type is used to differentiate between these two levels as well as it continues to differentiate among employee, contingent worker, applicants, and benefits assignments.
This is date-tracked and allows multiple changes in a day.

primary_keys.name: PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M_PK_
primary_keys.columns: LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, ASSIGNMENT_ID, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, EFFECTIVE_LATEST_CHANGE, EFFECTIVE_SEQUENCE

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: This is a system generated primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies person holding an assignment or a set of Employment/Placement Terms. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the Employment Level. Foreign key to PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the type of record: either assignment (employee, CWK, applicant, non-workers) or a set of Terms.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies the assignment or terms. Valid for Workers and non-workers. Assignment Level:By default [Person Number ] - [sequence] Work Term Level:[sequence]

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Used when defaulting assignment number.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Denormalized status of the assignment. This is derived using the Assignment Status Type ID.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Primary flag. Accepts value of ?Y? or ?N? based on ?YES_NO? lookup type. If set to ?Yes?, record represents the primary assignment associated to the primary Work Relationship and primary set of Employment/Placement Terms.

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Department Identifier, it is optional.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_JOBS_F.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_LOCATIONS_ALL_F.

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_POSITIONS_F.

columns.Name: GRADE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_GRADES_F.

columns.Name: GRADE_LADDER_PGM_ID
columns.Comments: Link assignment to grade ladder for Benefits.

columns.Name: PEOPLE_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PAY_PEOPLE_GROUPS.

columns.Name: COLLECTIVE_AGREEMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_COLLECTIVE_AGREEMENTS.

columns.Name: BARGAINING_UNIT_CODE
columns.Comments: Bargaining unit code.

columns.Name: LABOUR_UNION_MEMBER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Labour union member flag. Accepts values of ?Y? or ?N?.

columns.Name: CAGR_GRADE_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_CAGR_GRADES_DEF.

columns.Name: CAGR_ID_FLEX_NUM
columns.Comments: Key flex Structure Identifier for Collectively Agreed Grade.

columns.Name: CONTRACT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_CONTRACTS_F.

columns.Name: MANAGER_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the employee in this assignment is designated a manager. Based on ?YES_NO? lookup type.

columns.Name: DATE_PROBATION_END
columns.Comments: End date of probation period.

columns.Name: PROBATION_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Duration of probation period.

columns.Name: PROBATION_UNIT
columns.Comments: Units of probation period duration. Based on QUALIFYING_UNITS lookup type.

columns.Name: NORMAL_HOURS
columns.Comments: Normal working hours.

columns.Name: FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency of normal working hours, - week, month, year. Sourced from ?Frequency? lookup type.

columns.Name: WORK_AT_HOME
columns.Comments: Work at home flag.

columns.Name: TIME_NORMAL_FINISH
columns.Comments: Work day normal end time.

columns.Name: TIME_NORMAL_START
columns.Comments: Work day normal start time.

columns.Name: NOTICE_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Notice period for the assignment.

columns.Name: NOTICE_PERIOD_UOM
columns.Comments: Notice period unit of measure.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_CODE_COMB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS.

columns.Name: EMPLOYEE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Based on Lookup Type = ?EMPLOYEE_CATG?: Blue collar, Civil Servant, etc.

columns.Name: EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: User defined category. For example Full-Time Permanent or Part-Time Permanent. Lookup Type = ?EMP_CAT?.

columns.Name: ESTABLISHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F.

columns.Name: HOURLY_SALARIED_CODE
columns.Comments: Identifies if the assignment is paid by the hour or by a salary. Either maintained at the assignment level or ?Employment/Placement Terms? but not both.

columns.Name: SAL_REVIEW_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Length of time between salary reviews. Either maintained at the assignment level or ?Employment/Placement Terms? but not both.

columns.Name: SAL_REVIEW_PERIOD_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Used with SAL REVIEW PERIOD to define time between salary reviews. Based on ?QUALIFYING_UNITS? lookup type.

columns.Name: JOB_POST_SOURCE_NAME
columns.Comments: Job post source name.

columns.Name: PROJECT_TITLE
columns.Comments: Obsolete

columns.Name: PERSON_REFERRED_BY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies person who referred applicant. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to po_headers_all.

columns.Name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to po_lines_all.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies recruiter. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: RECRUITMENT_ACTIVITY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies activity associated with the recruitment process. Foreign key to PER_RECRUITMENT_ACTIVITIES.

columns.Name: VACANCY_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_VACANCIES.

columns.Name: APPLICANT_RANK
columns.Comments: Rank assigned to an applicant based on suitability and other criteria

columns.Name: POSTING_CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: The posting to which the applicant has applied.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Valid for 'Offer' and 'Applicant' Assignments only. Captured as part of the ?Application Source? details. For instance, Agency or Marketing.

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Recruitment activity source for applicant assignment, for example, Advertisement.

columns.Name: PROJECTED_ASSIGNMENT_END
columns.Comments: The date the assignment is expected to end.

columns.Name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.Comments: This is called Ledger in Fusion. Defaulted from Business Unit.

columns.Name: SOFT_CODING_KEYFLEX_ID
columns.Comments: Obsolete

columns.Name: SPECIAL_CEILING_STEP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_GRADE_STEPS_F.

columns.Name: VENDOR_ASSIGNMENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Assignment number of non-payrolled worker assignment with vending organization.

columns.Name: VENDOR_EMPLOYEE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Employee number of worker with vending organization.

columns.Name: VENDOR_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to po_vendors.

columns.Name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key reference to po_vendor_sites_all.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: WORK_TERMS_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M for a work term.

columns.Name: ACTION_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the action performed on the particular record. For example: HIRE, ADD PENDING WORKER, MANAGER CHANGE, etc.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Describes the type of assignment or set of Terms. Users can configure how to derive this (at setup time). This is optional, by default (out-of-the-box) this is derived as follows: [job name] - [department name].

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE
columns.Comments: Denormalized status of the assignment. This is derived using the Assignment Status Type ID.

columns.Name: AUTO_END_FLAG
columns.Comments: Used for temporary assignments. Determines whether to end the temporary job automatically.

columns.Name: DUTIES_TYPE
columns.Comments: Duties type. Apply for temporary assignments. Derived from a lookup code.  Enterprise stores types in a specific table rather than a lookup.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the order of different changes made during a day. The lowest value represents the earliest change in the day.

columns.Name: EXPENSE_CHECK_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Determines whether check is sent to the Home or Office address. Based on ?HOME_OFFICE? lookup.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_BUILDING
columns.Comments: Building information associated with Work location.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_FLOOR
columns.Comments: Floor information.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Additional location details.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_MAILSTOP
columns.Comments: Internal mail location.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_OFFICE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Office Number.

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Represents Legal Entity. Might be null for Applicants.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from the Legal Entity. Might be null for Applicants.

columns.Name: LINKAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines the type of processing and rules associated with the linking of two assignments.

columns.Name: PARENT_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Allows two assignments to be linked. Used when creating temporary assignments. Also, potentially required when converting the Applicant onto a Worker (i.e. this stores the applicant assignment ID for the worker?s assignment).

columns.Name: PERSON_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Defines the worker class. Examples: Assignee, Consultant, Expatriate, Agency/Temp, Intern, Apprentice, Contractor, Trainee. This defaults from the person/org relationship. It is defined at either level (Assignment or Employment/Placement Terms).

columns.Name: PRIMARY_WORK_TERMS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts value of ?Y? or ?N? based on ?YES_NO? lookup type. If set to ?Yes?, then the current row represents a Assignment attached to the primary set of Employment/Placement.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_ASSIGNMENT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts value of ?Y? or ?N? based on ?YES_NO? lookup type. If set to ?Yes?, then the current row represents the primary deployment.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_WORK_RELATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts value of ?Y? or ?N? based on ?YES_NO? lookup type. If set to ?Yes?, then the current row represents an Assignment or Employment/Placement attached to the primary Work Relationship.

columns.Name: PROJECTED_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Tentative start date (applicants).

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the reason for the action performed on the record.

columns.Name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.Comments: Derived from the person type id. It is included in this table to aid in performance.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Determinant for ?Set Enabled? tables and those using BU as a partitioning key.

columns.Name: BILLING_TITLE
columns.Comments: Billing Title for assignment.

columns.Name: STEP_ENTRY_DATE
columns.Comments: obsolete

columns.Name: TAX_ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ADDRESSES. This represents the address that is used for taxation purposes. This can be different from a ?mailing address?.

columns.Name: RECORD_CREATOR
columns.Comments: Record created By Module

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: PROPOSED_WORKER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Determines whether applicant will be hired/placed as an Employee or Contingent Worker. This represents a SYSTEM PERSON TYPE: EMP or CWK. This is also applicable for Pending Hires (workers).

columns.Name: RETIREMENT_AGE
columns.Comments: Represents the age, worker is retiring at.

columns.Name: RETIREMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the planned retirement date.

columns.Name: POSITION_OVERRIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Override Position related data. Accepts values of ?Y? and ?N?.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_LATEST_CHANGE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: 'Y' indicates that this row represents the latest change in the day.

columns.Name: ALLOW_ASG_OVERRIDE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Override Work Term related data. Accepts values of ?Y? and ?N?.  This is set for the Work Term. Default is set to ?N? for rows representing Assignments and it does not change. If row represents a Work Term, then this is user-enterable.

columns.Name: FREEZE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze start date (defaulted to End of time).

columns.Name: FREEZE_UNTIL_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze until date (defaulted to Start of Time).

columns.Name: ID_FLEX_NUM
columns.Comments: Represents ID Flex num for PeopleGroup KFF implementation.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Extensible Flexfield Category Code

columns.Name: FULL_PART_TIME
columns.Comments: FULL_PART_TIME

columns.Name: PERMANENT_TEMPORARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: PERMANENT_TEMPORARY_FLAG

columns.Name: GSP_ELIGIBILITY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Identifies if person is included in grade step progression.

columns.Name: UNION_ID
columns.Comments: Union to which a person belongs

columns.Name: SENIORITY_BASIS
columns.Comments: Seniority

columns.Name: OVERTIME_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Overtime Period

columns.Name: SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier (ID) of the source assignment that was used to create the assignment.

columns.Name: LAST_WORKING_DATE
columns.Comments: Last Date Worked (for terminated workers).

columns.Name: REVIEW_USER_ACCESS
columns.Comments: This stores user's option of review user access on Termination. Values accepted are 'I' for Immediately or 'A' for After termination

columns.Name: REHIRE_RECOMMENDATION
columns.Comments: Accepts Yes or No values. If Yes, person is recommended for re-hiring.

columns.Name: REHIRE_REASON
columns.Comments: If rehire recommendation is 'yes', then reason from recommending person is tracked via this field.

columns.Name: REHIRE_AUTHORIZER_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS. Represents the person who recommends the worker for rehire.

columns.Name: TERMINATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual termination date of  an assignment.

columns.Name: NOTIFICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the termination of employment was notified.

columns.Name: STANDARD_HOURS
columns.Comments: The standard working hours for the assignment.

columns.Name: STANDARD_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency of standard working hours, - week, month, year. Sourced from Frequency lookup type.

columns.Name: STD_ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION
columns.Comments: The standard annual working duration for the enterprise, legal employer, department, location, job, position, or assignment.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION_UNITS
columns.Comments: The unit of measure in hours, days, weeks, and months for the annual working and standard annual working durations.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION
columns.Comments: The annual working duration for the position and assignment.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_RATIO
columns.Comments: The ratio of annual working hours and standard annual working hours for the assignment.

columns.Name: ADJUSTED_FTE
columns.Comments: The Adjusted Full Time Equivalent value calculated by multiplying the FTE and the Annual Working Ratio for the assignment.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
